---
name: Benchmark Suggestion
about: Suggest a new benchmark task for the evaluation suite
title: 'BENCHMARK: [Category] — [short description]'
labels: benchmark
assignees: ''
---

## Category
<!-- Which domain does this benchmark target? -->
- [ ] Research — search, analysis, comparison
- [ ] Coding — implementation, debugging, refactoring
- [ ] Planning — decomposition, risk assessment, decision
- [ ] Operational — reporting, diagnostics, automation

## Task Description
<!-- What should the agent do? Be precise enough that the task is reproducible. -->

## Input
<!-- What is given to the agent? Codebase path? Spec? Requirements? -->

## Expected Output / Success Criteria
<!-- What must the agent produce or achieve to pass? -->

## Failure Criteria
<!-- What would clearly indicate failure? -->

## Difficulty
- [ ] Low — should take <5 minutes
- [ ] Medium — 5–15 minutes
- [ ] High — 15+ minutes

## Responsible Agent(s)
<!-- Which agent type(s) should be evaluated by this benchmark? -->
- [ ] explorer
- [ ] fixer
- [ ] designer
- [ ] librarian
- [ ] oracle
- [ ] observer

## Why This Benchmark Matters
<!-- What capability gap does this benchmark address? -->

## Dependencies
<!-- Does this benchmark require specific data, environment, or tools? -->

## Verification
<!-- How would a human verify the agent's output for this benchmark? -->
